content_text: Explore the future of fleet management in our latest research report. title: Remote Monitoring Systems
author: Matt da Cruz
excerpt: At CommsCloud, we see remote monitoring as the practical side of IoT
content_text: In today’s connected world, knowing what’s happening in your operation — wherever it is — is no longer a luxury. It’s a business necessity. Remote monitoring systems make that visibility possible. They empower logistics providers, utilities, and industrial operators to see, understand, and act on data in real time — often before a problem becomes a crisis.

title: OEM Library
author: peter.walsh@commscloud.com
content_text: Your IoT solution is only as reliable as its weakest configuration. Our OEM Library embeds resilience into devices from day one — eliminating field faults, misconfigurations, and costly downtime.

title: Embedded SIM and eSIM
author: peter.walsh@commscloud.com
excerpt: The terms “embedded SIM” and “eSIM” are often used interchangeably
content_text: The terms “embedded SIM” and “eSIM” are often used interchangeably, but they mean very different things. For anyone deploying IoT at scale, understanding the distinction can determine whether your devices remain flexible, compliant, and cost-efficient over their lifetime.

meta._wp_attachment_image_alt: The terms “embedded SIM” and “eSIM” are often used interchangeably, but they mean very different things.

title: cross-border IoT connectivity Africa
author: peter.walsh@commscloud.com
excerpt: IoT Connectivity for African Logistics
content_text: Every long-haul operator running Durban–Lubumbashi or Joburg–Maputo knows the pattern. A truck pulls up to the border. The tracking unit goes dark. The dashcam stops uploading. The control room calls the driver, and the driver doesn't know which network his SIM has just jumped to — or whether it's jumped at all.
